title: Chewy Smoky Meat Crumble
description: A gluten-free-friendly snack featuring shredded meat, air-fried to a smoky and chewy texture reminiscent of a nostalgic Slovakian dish.
instructions: Mix ground turkey, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper in a large bowl until well combined.
Add olive oil and vinegar to the mixture; stir gently to coat all meat.
Fold in gluten-free breadcrumbs and dried parsley flakes. Mix evenly.
Form the mixture into small, round balls (about 1 inch each).
Place the balls on a parchment-lined baking sheet or silicone mat.
Air fry for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and fully cooked, shaking halfway through cooking time to ensure even browning.
Allow to cool slightly before serving.
